name: Black Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 12 6 inch corn tortillas, cut into quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and bell pepper; sauté until softened.
3. Stir in garlic and cook for 1 minute more.
4. Add Rotel tomatoes, cumin, and black beans; stir to combine.
5. Simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with butter or cooking spray.
8. Layer half of the tortillas, cheese, black bean mixture over bottom third of the dish.
9. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
10. Bake for 20-35 minutes, until heated through and bubbly.
11. Remove from oven and let stand 5 to 10 minutes before serving.
12. Garnish as desired with tomatoes, lettuce, green onions, black olives, and sour cream.
